content: 3.WORKS SIMILAR TO THE NATURE OF WORK UNDER THIS TENDER PERFORMED BY THE BIDDER FOR THE LAST FIVE (5) -FIFTEEN (15) YEARS IN REPUBLIC OF IRAQ. 中文
3.在伊拉克共和国过去的五（5）至十五（15）年中，投标人在本标书要求的工作性质下进行的工作类似。
4.WORKS SIMILAR TO THE NATURE OF WORK UNDER THIS TENDER PERFORMED BY THE BIDDER FOR THE LAST FIVE (5) -FIFTEEN (15) YEARS IN OTHER COUNTRIES (NOT IRAQ)。中文
4.在过去的五（5）至十五（15）年中，投标人在其他国家（而非伊拉克）进行的工作类似于本标书所要求的工作性质。

To: Contract & Procurement Dept. / EBS Petroleum Company Limited
Attn: Mr. Wang Shaoyu
We, Chengdu North Petroleum Exploration and Development Technology Company Limited (hereinafter referred as “CNPED”), appreciate COMPANY’s invitation to tender for Provision of Drilling Program Services for EBS Oilfield, Tender No. 043-SC-22-EBS (hereinafter, the “WORKS”).
We acknowledge that we have thoroughly reviewed the Invitation to Bid documents, investigated and satisfied ourselves as to all general and local conditions affecting the WORKS and hereby submit the attached Bid Proposal, and that we shall be solely responsible for the fulfillment of the WORKS and that the WORKS shall be provided in accordance with the applicable standards and good engineering practice.
We offer to provide the WORKS as requested in the Invitation to Bid documents and as stated in our Bid Proposal (Technical Proposal and Commercial Proposal) attached hereto. This offer is valid for 120 days from the Closing Date and shall be binding upon us and may be accepted at any time by EBS Petroleum Company Limited, during this period.
We commit and follow the technical requirement mentioned in the Scope of Work in the ITB, and provide comprehensive work plan to support the technical requirement mentioned in the Scope of Work in the ITB, and enough technical description for all required items including equipment, materials, and personnel(with CVs) in order to check the service ability by user dept..
If our proposal is accepted, we undertake that, pending the execution of a formal CONTRACT, this Bid Proposal and all other relevant documentation, together with your written acceptance shall constitute a binding agreement between us.
We hope that the Proposal can satisfy you, and believe that we have full understanding of the ITB and we can meet the scope of work described in the ITB and intent to fulfill the scope upon mutually agreed terms and conditions. We expect to have the opportunity to provide such kind of services to your esteemed company and we believe it will be beneficial for your company if we could be the successful bidder. We will remain grateful if you award the job to CNPED. We will be always ready to help you and will provide excellent services.
If any clarification regarding to our proposal is requested, kindly please contact us as undersigned.
Sincerely,中文

content:
致：EBS石油公司合同与采购部，王少宇先生：

我们成都北方石油勘探开发技术有限公司（以下简称“CNPED”）感谢贵公司邀请参加EBS油田钻井方案服务招标，编号043-SC-22-EBS（以下简称“工程”）。

我们确认已经认真审查了招标文件，调查并满足了所有影响工程的一般和当地条件，并在此提交附带的投标方案，我们将全权负责工程的履行，工程将按照适用的标准和良好的工程惯例提供。

我们愿意根据招标文件要求和我们附带的投标方案（技术方案和商业方案）提供工程，此报价有效期为截标日起120天，在此期间EBS石油公司随时可以接受我们的报价。

我们承诺遵循招标说明书中所提到的技术要求，并提供全面工作计划来支持说明书中提到的技术要求，并提供所有所需项目（包括设备、材料和人员（附简历））的足够技术描述，以便用户部门检查服务能力。

如果我们的投标方案被接受，在正式合同签订前，我们保证本投标方案和所有其他相关文件，连同您的书面接受，将构成我们之间的有约束力的协议。

我们希望我们的方案能够满足您的要求，相信我们充分理解了招标说明书，可以满足说明书中描述的工作范围，并打算在相互同意的条款和条件下履行该工作。我们期待有机会为贵公司提供这样的服务，相信如果我们能够成为中标者，将对贵公司有益处。如果您能授予工程给CNPED，我们将不胜感激。我们将随时准备帮助您，并提供优质的服务。

如果需要澄清我们的投标方案，请与下方联系方式联系我们。

此致

敬礼
COMPLIANCE WITH SCOPE OF WORK 英文
COMPLIANCE WITH SCOPE OF WORK
COMPLIANCE WITH SCOPE OF WORK 中文
符合工作范围要求

CNPED is awarded Engineering Consulting Entity Grade B Credit Certificate for Petroleum and Natural Gas Industry by Engineering Consulting Association Of Sichuan Province, China. The service scope of the engineering consulting entity qualification includes the following 8 aspects:
(1)Planning consulting: including industry, special and regional development planning preparation, consulting.
(2)Prepare project proposal (including project investment opportunity study and pre-feasibility study).
(3)Prepare project feasibility study report, project application report and fund application report.
(4)Evaluation consulting: including project proposal, feasibility study report, project application report and preliminary design evaluation, as well as project post-evaluation, summary budget and final account review, etc.
(5)Engineering Proposal.
(6)Bidding Agency.
(7)Project Supervision, Equipment Supervision.
(8)Project management: Including the whole process of the project or several stages of management services.
The Engineering Consulting Entity Grade B Credit Certificate enables CNPED for the services of drilling and engineering design & drilling geology proposal. Please kindly find the copy of the certificate in SECTION T3 COMPANY GENERAL CAPACITY, Article 3.6 Company’s General Professional Certificate. 翻译

CNPED获得了中国四川省工程咨询协会颁发的石油天然气行业工程咨询实施机构B级信用证书。该工程咨询实施机构的服务范围包括以下8个方面：

（1）规划咨询：包括产业、专项和区域发展规划编制、咨询。

（2）编制项目建议书（包括项目投资机会研究和前期可行性研究）。

（3）编制项目可行性研究报告、项目申请报告和资金申请报告。

（4）评估咨询：包括项目建议书、可行性研究报告、项目申请报告和初步设计评估，以及项目后评估、预算总结和决算审查等。

（5）工程方案。

（6）招标代理。

（7）项目监理、设备监理。

（8）项目管理：包括整个项目或若干阶段的管理服务。

工程咨询实施机构B级信用证书使CNPED能够提供钻井、工程设计和钻井地质方案等服务。请在第T3节公司综合能力中查找证书副本，第3.6条公司的综合专业资质。

content: PROJECT MANAGEMENT of Research On the Exploration and Development Data Governance
“探明开发数据治理研究”的项目管理
Some thing about the PROJECT MANAGEMENT of Research On the Exploration and Development Data Governance

The project management of "Research on the Exploration and Development Data Governance" involves planning, organizing, and managing resources to achieve specific goals and objectives related to the research project.

Some of the key aspects of project management in this context may include:

1. Defining the scope of the project: This involves specifying the research questions and objectives, clearly defining the data governance issues to be studied, and identifying the key stakeholders.

2. Establishing a project team: This involves identifying the relevant expertise and skills required for the project and assembling a team of professionals to carry out the research.

3. Setting a timeline: This includes developing a schedule for completing the various tasks involved in the research project, and establishing deadlines for each phase.

4. Allocating resources: This includes identifying the necessary resources such as personnel, funding, equipment, and facilities, and making sure they are available when needed.

5. Monitoring and controlling the project: This involves tracking progress, identifying and addressing issues, and making necessary adjustments to keep the project on track.

6. Reporting and communicating: This includes regular reporting on project progress and communicating with stakeholders to ensure that they are informed and involved in the research.

Overall, effective project management is critical for the success of "Research on the Exploration and Development Data Governance" project, ensuring that it is completed on time, within budget, and meets its desired outcomes.

content:
If the tender awarded，the following work plan will be executed in compliance with the scope of work：
1)Supply of necessary equipment, including but not limited workstation, laptop, printer, binding machine and related consumption, etc.
2)Provision of mainstream drilling design and geological software, such as Landmark or equivalent software.
3)Provision of qualified, experienced and certificated design engineers.
4)Provision of Drilling Design & Program and Drilling Geology Proposal Service, include but not limited to developing wells and evaluation wells.
5)Provision of design engineer support, including but not limited collect and analyze drilled wells data, drill well on paper (DWOP), track of design implementation, Drilling Proposal change management, drilling operation performance analysis, Drilling Design & Program and Drilling Geology Proposal continues to improve, etc.
Once the tender awarded, all the equipment (hardware and software), material and personnel that compliance with the scope of work will be in position within three (3) days. For each well, CNPED will submit Drilling Program and/or Drilling Geology Proposal to COMPANY within seven (7) days after received Call-out Order accordingly for reviewing and approving.翻译

如果中标，将按照工作范围要求执行以下工作计划：
1）提供必要的设备，包括但不限于工作站、笔记本电脑、打印机、装订机及相关消耗品等。
2）提供主流的钻井设计和地质软件，例如Landmark或等效软件。
3）提供具有资格、经验和证明的设计工程师。
4）提供钻井设计和方案及钻井地质方案服务，包括但不限于开发井和评价井，等。
5）提供设计工程师支持，包括但不限于收集和分析钻井数据、纸上钻井评审（DWOP）、跟踪设计执行情况，钻井方案变更管理，钻井作业绩效分析，钻井设计和地质方案持续改进等。

中标后，所有符合工作范围要求的设备（硬件和软件）、材料和人员将会在三（3）天内就位。对于每个井，CNPED将于收到呼叫指令后的七（7）天内提交钻井程序和/或钻井地质方案给公司审查和批准。
